name: Lasagna from Tony's at Disney World
recipeInstructions:
~----------Meat Sauce:---------- ~----------Lasagna:-----------
~----------Ricotta Mixture:------------ Heat olive oil in a saucepan. Crumble the ground beef and sauté until browned. Drain excess fat. Add remaining ingredients and mix well. Continue cooking for 5 minutes. Set aside.
Cook lasagne noodles in boiling water with olive oil and salt (about 9 minutes). Drain and let cool. Set aside.
Combine all ingredients in a blender or electric mixer and mix well at medium speed.
Assembling: In a 13x9x2-inch casserole, spread a thin layer of meat sauce on the bottom. Add one layer of cooked lasagne noodles. Next, add a layer of sliced mozzarella. Then, add 1/3 of the meat sauce, followed by 1/2 of the ricotta mixture. Continue to layer until all ingredients are used. Top with grated Parmesan cheese. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
